name: Layers of Mushroom
steps: Bring the cream to the boil and pour over the chocolate. Leave for 1 minute and add the mushroom powder, stick blend.
Pour into a paco jet container and cool in the fridge.
Once chilled, pass in the paco jet twice until well incorporated.
Add all ingredients in stockpot, bring to the boil, pass the stock and keep the mushrooms.
Dissolve the agar in the mushroom stock, bring to the boil while whisking constantly and weigh 500g.
Once set, cut into rectangles of 6cm x 3cm.
